sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for node in nodes:
    if node['color'] == 'N' and node['pixels'] == 4:
        print(f"Green: {node['boundary'][0]}")
    if node['color'] == 'R' and node['pixels'] == 24:
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = b[2][0] - b[0][0]
        cols = b[1][1] - b[0][1]
        print(f"Red: {'vertical' if rows > cols else 'horizontal'}")
    if node['color'] == 'b' and node['pixels'] == 16:
        print(f"Blue: {node['boundary'][0]}")

# Check if red toggled
prev_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in previous_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
curr_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']}

# Find red node in current frame
for node in curr_nodes.values():
    if node['color'] == 'R' and node['pixels'] == 24:
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = b[2][0] - b[0][0]
        cols = b[1][1] - b[0][1]
        print(f"Red is now: {'vertical' if rows > cols else 'horizontal'}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
